Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Relates to authorities which collect tolls
Summary: Requires every public authority which collects tolls from motorists to submit an annual report to the legislature; establishes the New York and New Jersey toll and fees reduction task force.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public authorities law, in relation to toll collections; and in relation to establishing the New York and New Jersey toll and fees reduction task force
